svg.text: React + FastAPI + MongoDB · Multi-provider AI pipeline with full graceful degradation
HTTPS / REST · Bearer JWT · Vite proxy → localhost:8000 in dev
FastAPI · Python 3.12 · Pydantic v2 · Motor (async) → Render
Three independent pipelines · Every provider has a fallback · Product never returns an error
→ recommendation · confidence · strengths · concerns · draft email · follow-up actions
company URL → 7-stage background task → full IC memo
Progress written to MongoDB at every stage — frontend polls GET /reports/{id} every 1.5 s
Output: thesis fit score · moat analysis (8 dimensions) · red flags · diligence questions · IC memo · sources
async read / write · Motor + ObjectId → string serialization · every doc scoped by user_id
All domain collections scoped by user_id · research_cache keyed by normalized domain, 14-day TTL, shared across all users to prevent redundant web crawls
Repositories handle ObjectId ↔ string serialization · Motor async driver · JWT sessions valid 7 days
called from API and service layers at runtime
all providers have fallbacks — quality scales with available API keys
has a fallback — product always ships.
RTP Conviction · Built for RTP Global Case Study 2026 · React + FastAPI + MongoDB
